{{Quote|Solve my puzzle and learn about the Wookiee known as Chewbacca.|Yoda, ''Star Wars Kids'' 2 introduction|<ref name="Star Wars Kids 2 (1997)">[[Star Wars Kids (1997) 2|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 2]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars Kids'' 2''' is the second issue of [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[October]] [[1997]]. Issue 2 included part two of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[The Rebel Thief]]'', written by [[Ryder Windham]].

''Star Wars Kids'' 2 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 2 came packaged with the game's second adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 2: Escape from Thyferra|''Escape from Thyferra'']].
